name: 05_metrics_contract_transport_dev_transport_sht
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_sht' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_nps03_sb' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Date_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Date_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END) AS latest_observed_ts,
  MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Date_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Date_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Date_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Date_Time' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_sht`.`utbl_nps03_sb`
UNION ALL
